overview: A next-generation, cinematic ed-tech platform for Arthashastra Classes — a commerce coaching institute in Bhopal, India. Features immersive 3D animations, real authentication, a full admin content management system, student and teacher dashboards, Stripe payments, and a dynamic course library — all wrapped in a futuristic glassmorphism design.
features: Cinematic 3D hero with floating particles and animated counters
Role-based access: student, teacher, and admin portals
Full admin CMS: manage courses, teachers, testimonials, announcements, and site settings
Student dashboard with enrolled courses, materials, and progress tracking
Stripe-powered course and store checkout with coupon codes
Gallery with lightbox, category filters, and event photos
Dynamic announcement banner and testimonials carousel from backend data
Faculty detail pages with qualifications and ratings
Legal pages: Privacy Policy, Terms, and Refund Policy
WhatsApp chat button, back-to-top, exit-intent lead popup, and mobile CTA bar
Bookmarks and notification center in student dashboard
404 animated error page and cookie consent banner
